Parse Coverage
Artifact Layers
What This Platform Does
Enterprise-grade COBOL modernisation intelligence
Deep Code Understanding
ProLeap ANTLR4 COBOL parser converts every .CBL file into a typed AST. Seven artifact layers extract paragraphs, data items, CFG edges, def-use chains, business rules, and migration risks — all stored in a queryable SQLite graph database with UUID-stable node identity.
Multi-Agent Specification Generation
Six LLM personas run in parallel — Business Summary, High-Level Architecture, Low-Level Architecture, Functional Spec, Technical Spec, Modernisation Spec — each grounded against structured artifact slices. No raw COBOL reaches the LLM. Output exports as Markdown and styled PDF.
HITL Forward Engineering
Seven-step transformation pipeline (Discovery → Spec → Architecture → Domain Model → Business Logic → Integration → Tests) with Human-in-the-Loop approval at each gate. Auto mode lets the LLM act as HITL reviewer, generating target Java (Spring Boot, Quarkus, etc.) with proper BigDecimal arithmetic.
Pipeline Layers
7 Layers
AST → Rules → Quality
Spec Personas
6 Parallel
LLM agents in parallel
Transform Steps
7-Step HITL
Approve/reject each step
REST Endpoints
50+ APIs
Full OpenAPI docs

Pipeline Flow
L1ProLeap ANTLR4 → Typed AST + UUID nodes
L2Symbol table, data dictionary, 88-level conditions
L3CFG, def-use chains, cyclomatic complexity
L4Call graph, JCL bindings, CICS tx flow
L5Business rules, arithmetic specs
L6BMS screen maps, CSD catalog, SQL/CICS
L7Coverage, dead code, migration risk register

Pipeline running…
0%
Pipeline Stages
⏳COPY/REPLACE Preprocessing
⏳ProLeap COBOL Parsing (ANTLR4)
⏳Layer 1 — Typed AST + UUIDs
⏳Layer 2 — Symbol Table + Types
⏳Layer 3 — CFG + Def-Use Chains
⏳Layer 4 — Call Graph + JCL + CICS
⏳Layers 5–7 — Rules + Quality
Execution Log
Run History
Each pipeline execution is logged here. Clearing a run resets all artifact tables.

Holistic Modernisation Report

Building…

    

  







  
Forward Engineering — Modernization Workflow

  
Four-phase workflow: analyze the portfolio, map source to target architecture, plan the migration with human approval, then generate specifications and Spring Boot code.


  
  

    

      

        
Application Portfolio — Full Scope

        
All artifacts ingested — programs, copybooks, JCL jobs, BMS maps, CICS transactions. Every step in this workflow is grounded against the 7-layer artifact database.

      

      

        
—
Programs

        
—
Business Rules

        
—
High Risks

        
—
JCL Jobs

Target Framework

        
      

      

        
Target Cloud

        
      

      

        
Decomposition Pattern

        
      

    

  


  
  

    
1 · Portfolio Analysis

    
2 · Architecture Mapping

    
3 · Migration Plan

    
4 · Specifications & Code

Target Platform Recommender

  
AI-driven cloud architecture recommendation — complete portfolio analysis covering all COBOL programs, JCL jobs, copybooks, CICS transactions, data items, and migration risks


  
  

    

      
      Full Application Portfolio Scope
      Analyses all programs, copybooks, JCL jobs, BMS maps, CICS transactions, data items, and migration risks — not scoped to a single program.
    

  


  


    
    


      
      

        
Hyperscaler Preference

        

          
          
          
          
        

      


      
      

        
Modernisation Preferences

        

          

            
            
          

          

            
            
          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      
    


    
    

      

        
        
Select your preferences and click Generate Recommendation

        
The engine analyses your COBOL artifact store — call graph, data items, CICS verbs, JCL bindings, and migration risks — then maps them to cloud-native services on your preferred hyperscaler.

      

      

        
        
Analysing artifacts…

Multi-agent spec generation is now in the Spec Generator page.

Pipeline Layer Explorer

  
Visual breakdown of every artifact layer — from raw COBOL → structured AST → graphs → business rules → quality metrics


  
  

    

      
L1

      
AST Builder

    

    
→

    

      
L2

      
Symbol Table

    

    
→

    

      
L3

      
CFG + Def-Use

    

    
→

    

      
L4

      
Inter-Program

    

    
→

    

      
L5

      
Business Rules

    

    
→

    

      
L6

      
Resources

    

    
→

    

      
L7

      
Quality

    

  


  
Loading layer data…

  


    
    

      

        L1
        

          
AST Builder — ProLeap ANTLR4 COBOL Parser

          
Parses every .CBL file into a typed AST. Copybook COPY/REPLACE expansion with provenance tracking. UUID5-stable node identity.

        

      

      

        

          
—

          
Programs

        

        

          
—

          
Paragraphs

        

        

          
—

          
Statements

        

      

      
Output: nodes table · JSON artifacts in output/layer1/

      

        
      

    


    
    

      

        L2
        

          
Symbol Table & Data Dictionary

          
Extracts every data item with PIC/USAGE → canonical type (BigDecimal / long / String). Level-88 condition names resolved to parent variable comparisons.

        

      

      

        

          
—

          
Data Items

        

        

          
—

          
88-Level Conditions

        

        

          
—

          
Copybook References

        

      

      
Output: data_items · conditions_88 · copybook_use tables · JSON in output/layer2/

      

        
      

    


    
    

      

        L3
        

          
Control-Flow Graph + Def-Use Chains

          
Builds intra-program CFG with typed edges: PERFORM, BRANCH_TRUE, BRANCH_FALSE, BRANCH_WHEN, FALLTHROUGH, GOTO, LOOP_BACK. Tracks every data-item read and write.

        

      

      

        

          
—

          
CFG Edges

        

        

          
—

          
Branch Edges

        

        

          
—

          
Def-Use Entries

        

      

      
Edge type breakdown:

      

      
Output: control_flow · def_use · complexity_metrics · JSON in output/layer3/

      

        
      

    


    
    

      

        L4
        

          
Inter-Program Graphs

          
Call graph (static CALL + CICS LINK/XCTL), file I/O graph, CICS transaction flow, JCL job chain, and JCL DD → COBOL logical file bindings.

        

      

      

        

          
—

          
Call Edges

          

        

        

          
—

          
File I/O Ops

        

        

          
—

          
Tx Flow Edges

        

        

          
—

          
JCL Bindings

        

      

      
Output: call_graph · file_io · transaction_flow · jcl_program_binding

      

        
      

    


    
    

      

        L5
        

          
Business Rules & Arithmetic Specs

          
Extracts every IF/EVALUATE predicate as a structured rule. Resolves 88-level condition names. Parses arithmetic statements into expression trees for Java codegen.

        

      

      

        

          
—

          
Total Rules

        

        

          
—

          
IF Rules

        

        

          
—

          
EVALUATE Rules

        

        

          
—

          
Arithmetic Specs

        

      

      
Output: business_rules · arithmetic_specs · JSON in output/layer5/

      

        
      

    


    
    

      

        L6
        

          
Resources — BMS, CSD, JCL, SQL, CICS

          
BMS screen/field catalog, CICS CSD definitions (PROGRAM/TRANSACTION/MAPSET), JCL job steps, embedded SQL table references, CICS verb extraction.

        

      

      

        

          
—

          
BMS Screen Maps

        

        

          
—

          
CSD Definitions

        

      

      
Output: screen_map · csd_catalog · jcl_job · jcl_dd

      

        
      

    


    
    

      

        L7
        

          
Quality — Coverage, Complexity & Risk

          
Parse coverage report. Cyclomatic complexity per paragraph. Dead-code detection. Migration risk register (ALTER, dynamic CALL, HANDLE CONDITION, ODO, REDEFINES overlaps).

        

      

      

        

          
—

          
Coverage %

        

        

          
—

          
High Risk

        

        

          
—

          
Medium Risk

        

        

          
—

          
Low Risk

        

      

      
Output: parse_coverage · complexity_metrics · risk_register

      

        
      

    


  


  
  

    

      

        
Layer Data
